title: Time for Best of Mossel Bay nominations again
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - It's time for the...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - It's time for the inaugural Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards, an exciting celebration of excellence in our community.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - It's time for the inaugural Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards, an exciting celebration of excellence in our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From top-notch services and impressive DIY endeavours to outstanding accommodation, delectable dining experiences and rejuvenating health and beauty havens, we're on a quest to uncover and honour the fine establishments that make Mossel Bay shine.","html":"From top-notch services and impressive DIY endeavours to outstanding accommodation, delectable dining experiences and rejuvenating health and beauty havens, we're on a quest to uncover and honour the fine establishments that make Mossel Bay shine."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Brought to you by Mossel Bay Advertiser, who could be better to serve as judges of the award nominees than you, our readers?"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"How it works:Starting on 1 May, nominations can be made for all categories.","html":"How it works:
Starting on 1 May, nominations can be made for all categories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We're seeking nominations of businesses that not only excel in their respective fields but also embody the spirit of Mossel Bay, going above and beyond to elevate our community.","html":"We're seeking nominations of businesses that not only excel in their respective fields but also embody the spirit of Mossel Bay, going above and beyond to elevate our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Best of all, the nomination and voting process is entirely free, ensuring all have a voice in recognising their favourite companies.","html":"Best of all, the nomination and voting process is entirely free, ensuring all have a voice in recognising their favourite companies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"So, don't miss your chance to champion deserving companies in Mossel Bay.","html":"So, don't miss your chance to champion deserving companies in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By participating, you stand a chance to win special prizes yourself.","html":"By participating, you stand a chance to win special prizes yourself."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nominations are now open! Click here to nominate your favorite businesses today!","html":"Nominations are now open! Click here to nominate your favorite businesses today!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Nominations close 15 May 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Join us in making history as we crown the champions of our community.","html":"Join us in making history as we crown the champions of our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An image of our beautiful town, taken offshore of The Point. Photo: Michael de Nobrega","html":"An image of our beautiful town, taken offshore of The Point. Photo: Michael de Nobrega"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
